title: Kaloo - Blue Teddy Bear 17cm - Ultra-soft plush for baby - Tender companion from birth - Ideal size for little hands - Birth Gift - K214014
features: A soft companion for soothing cuddles: with its ultra-soft fur and soothing blue colour, this cuddly blanket is perfect for comforting baby and offering him moments of absolute softness.

Everyday soft toy: whether it's to soothe baby before bedtime, keep him company during playtime or accompany him on his discoveries, each Patapouf is designed to become a real everyday ally. Its size and softness make it the ideal partner for tender moments.

A companion for sensory stimulation: the soft, harmonious colours stimulate sight, while the stitching and embroidered details stimulate touch. The ears, long limbs and delicate ribbons encourage prehension. Each Patapouf is the ideal companion to help your little ones develop their senses.

The perfect gift for little ones: presented in an elegant gift box, Patapouf is the ideal birth or birthday present. Its perfect 17 cm size and endearing design make it an instant companion, machine washable for everyday use.

Kaloo, the perfect blend of softness and tenderness: each Kaloo creation is designed to wrap baby in a cocoon of tenderness. Exceptional materials, poetic design and attention to the smallest detail make Kaloo a unique and precious brand.
description: Product Description Discover the Patapouf collection of soft, cuddly comforters designed to offer softness and comfort to little ones. Carefully designed in ultra-soft materials such as flannel and micro-velvet, these adorable companions wrap baby in a cocoon of tenderness with every cuddle. With their irresistible fur and delicate colours, they're sure to appeal to children and parents alike. Each Patapouf, whether a rabbit or a bear, is available in different sizes (17 cm or 25 cm), to suit small hands and big cuddles. The variety of colours, from soothing green and luminous yellow to delicate pink and soothing blue, stimulate the senses and create a soft, reassuring world for baby. The embroidered details, ribbons and long ears or paws add a playful and educational touch, helping baby to develop fine motor skills and prehension. Perfect for the first moments of life, Patapoufs are also an excellent gift idea. Presented in an elegant gift box, they're easy to give for a birth, a birthday or any other special occasion. Machine washable, these cuddly toys combine practicality and design for carefree everyday use. Give baby a loyal companion who will accompany him as he discovers new things, sleeps peacefully and plays. With the Patapouf collection, every cuddle becomes a promise of infinite softness and shared love. Its compact 17 cm size is ideal for curious little hands. Lightweight and easy to handle, this bear accompanies baby on all his adventures, whether at home, on a walk or on a trip. The clever ‘feather’ folds add an easy grip that encourages baby to explore and cuddle even more. Made from certified and safe materials, this cuddly toy guarantees total peace of mind for parents. Its varied textures and refined design awaken baby's senses while providing a comforting presence. Ideal for playtime, discovery or just a cuddly nap, this green bear is the perfect companion. Kaloo's 17cm green teddy bear is also an original and soothing gift idea for a birth or birthday. With its timeless design and exceptional softness, it will quickly become a precious keepsake and a faithful companion for baby and his family. Safety Warning No warning applicable
